description: Create a mechanical cross-section detail drawing of a keyed shaft in LibreCAD. The drawing must feature a 50mm diameter shaft with a rectangular keyway notch 14mm wide and 5.5mm deep (measured radially inward from the shaft circumference). Organize all elements onto the following layers: SHAFT (shaft and keyway geometry), CENTER (horizontal and vertical center lines), HATCHING (cross-section hatching for the solid shaft area, excluding the keyway), DIMENSIONS (diameter, width, and depth), and TEXT (annotations: 'SHAFT', 'KEYWAY', '1045', and 'DIN 6885'). Ensure proper drafting standards are followed and save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/shaft_keyway_section.dxf.
